milady!
yeah what's up?

I have a lot of really dumb questions about Milady

1. What is Miladycraft?
2. How do I "officially" get one of those pfp's? Like where do I buy it? 
3. Once I figure out where to buy it, I wanted to figure out how to make one (and is there a process that makes it get adopted as an "official" milady nft profile pic?)

this is for like if I wanted (1) an already existing milady pic to put on my defender account here https://www.remilia.net/~defender (2) and then separately understand the process for creating a custom one to contribute to the ecosystem
https://x.com/evalladen/status/2076316230932177278

miladycraft is a minecraft server, opensea is a good place to buy the NFT, but u can just copy one it works just as well, that's what i did, and this is how u make them: http://maker.remilia.org/milady it won't be official but it still looks cool
the keywords are different fwiw
you need to look for terms relating to brand management and public relations
Once in a while a PR company gets called out for astroturfing and botting, make sure to check them out each time
Ok nice. Will update you if I have trouble acquiring one

i was thinking of a disclaimer at the start of future articles like:

> if you are truly open minded and you have witnessed the power that fixed beliefs can have over you this article is intended for you. if you have an outgroup that you strongly think are dumb or bad people and you engage with them in debates frequently then stop reading now there is no value for you here

This is good as explicit fence. 

You might still get people who identify as "open minded" who trip over it anyway. The other option is targeted language (use well calibrated jargon) 

I am curious to see which approach you end up preferring

will prolly have no disclaimer and just trust god xD

i like the idea of setting the scene and the type of character in the scene so that people would prolly be more open minded while reading, will think about it

This is self-serving but I suggest you try praying before, during, and after reading small sections from Ecclesiastes and Proverbs in the Bible. Especially useful to connect it back to the New Testament (Jesus and the judgment parables).

"Spiritual reading" (for lack of a better term...) is essentially a way to borrow from the prayers from others and get funneled down a corridor that others have explored, then wandering on your own through a well-designed space. Wisdom literature (both in and out of the Bible) trains your mind and spirit to orient that which stands the test of generations, which forms a kind of ethical education without really getting too nitty-gritty.

For a Christian, reflecting on the wisdom literature of the Old Testament intensifies the fact of Jesus being the teleological end. It lets one see the eternal principles behind the movement of mind and spirit that made biblical Israel a major center (if not historical then ideological) of spiritual learning. Jesus is everywhere in the Hebrew Bible.
